projects.name: PromptOps - AI Prompt Template Management System
projects.description: Built a Python/FastAPI backend for prompt lifecycle management, including CRUD APIs, schema validation, template rendering, versioning, and export workflows for enterprise AI use cases.

projects.name: Warranty Claim Anomaly Detection Platform
projects.description: Designed and implemented anomaly-detection workflows using XGBoost, Isolation Forest, SHAP, and interactive review interfaces to detect unusual claims patterns and improve operational visibility.

projects.name: Stock Price Forecasting and MLOps Pipeline
projects.description: Created an end-to-end forecasting workflow with TensorFlow LSTM models, Dockerized deployment, model validation, monitoring, and rollout practices for reliable production delivery.

projects.name: Ad Genius - Ad Content Generation Tool
projects.description: Prototyped an AI-assisted content generation workflow using LangChain, prompt templates, scoring logic, and dashboard-based campaign iteration for faster creative workflows.
